title: On the Pythagorean Life
description: The biography of Pythagoras as a divine man: his miracles, his teachings, and the way of life he established.
introduction: The biography of Pythagoras as a divine man: his miracles, his teachings, and the way of life he established.

translation.text: Pythagoras was said to be the son of Apollo. His whole life was a demonstration of divine philosophy.
